title: Super-Fix Finding
description: Schema for a single audit finding in the Super-Fix zero-trust audit framework

id.description: Unique finding ID, e.g. CON-001, SEC-012

severity.description: P0=Security/Data corruption/Crash, P1=Functional bug/Race, P2=Minor/Cosmetic, P3=Enhancement

file.description: File path with line range, e.g. src/main/.../Foo.java:42-56

snippet.description: Brief code snippet illustrating the issue

description.description: Detailed description of the issue, scenario, and impact

remediation.description: Concrete fix recommendation with code example

hash.description: Stable semantic hash for cross-run dedup (12 hex chars)

root_cause.description: Root cause analysis — why this defect exists

causal_chain.description: Trigger → Propagation → Impact → Root cause classification

seen_by.description: Which lens(es) independently identified this finding

test_ids.description: IDs of tests covering this finding (for mutation kill verification)

mutation_killed.description: Whether mutation test confirmed test effectiveness
